title: microsorum cuspidatum subsp. beddomei
intro: Microsorum cuspidatum subsp. beddomei, also known as Beddome's Microsorum or Himalayan Muhlenbeckia, is a sub species of Microsorum cuspidatum, a type of fern native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Beddome's Microsorum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, it is often prepared as a tea or used in combination with other herbs to treat a range of ailments.
